notes: Executable parity for `productOptionsCreate(variantStrategy: CREATE)` fanout beyond Shopify's historical 100-variant default limit. The 2025-01 `harry-test-heelo` shop accepted 110 variants with no userErrors, so this fixture records Extended Variants-relevant success behavior rather than a limit rejection. Proxy replay first hydrates the captured pre-mutation product through a public product read, then runs the supported mutation locally.
